page: Microsoft Azure E2as_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Easv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 2 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) paired with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include any local NVMe or temporary SSD storage, meaning all operating system and application data must reside on external volumes. It is, however, Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach remote storage disks to meet specific input/output requirements. Additionally, the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the E2as_v7 is structured as a memory-optimized entry-level instance. This high memory density relative to the low vCPU count provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require a larger memory footprint without demanding massive parallel processing power. Appropriate workloads include small-scale databases, caching layers, enterprise applications with moderate compute requirements, and lightweight memory-bound development environments.
description: Microsoft Azure E2as_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the AMD-powered Easv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, but it is Premium Storage capable, enabling remote storage attachments. Lacking integrated GPUs, the server is designed for non-accelerated workloads. The high memory density relative to its low compute footprint makes this instance a cost-effective choice for memory-bound applications that do not require extensive parallel processing. Appropriate workloads include small-scale databases, caching systems, and lightweight enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E2as_v7 is an AMD-powered virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for memory-optimized workloads without local storage.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E2as_v7 is an AMD-powered virtual machine with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, optimized for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: An AMD-powered virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio for memory-intensive workloads requiring minimal compute resources.

Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
